title: Snapshot вЂ” 2026-03
text:
Key insights

Headline takeaways auto-derived from this snapshot вЂ” counts of high-/low-adoption BUs, dominant tools, and activation gaps. The aim is to surface what ExCo would otherwise pull out of the report by hand.



рџџұ


2 BUs at 100% adoption


Executive, Technology fully equipped.




рџџҰ


7 BUs at 50вЂ“79% adoption


Capacity to close quickly with targeted activation.




рџ”ө


4 BUs need activation


1 BUs at 0%: Cryptography; 3 below 50%.




рџ¤–


ChatGPT is most-used (42%)


79 of 187 employees licensed. Niche tools (<15%): Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Gemini.




рџ“Љ


61.0% overall вЂ” ahead of PS industry median (~55вЂ“60%)


Licensed = at least one AI tool seat resolved to the employee.




рџҺҮ


73 employees (39%) have zero tools


Priority activation cohort for next month.

title: Snapshot вЂ” 2026-03
text:
Strategic themes вЂ” next month

Three concrete cohorts to action next month, derived from the data above. Numbers in bold are pulled from this snapshot; framings (PRIORITY / SCALE / AMPLIFY) mirror the ExCo reportвЂ™s В§4.




рџ”өPRIORITY


Tool provisioning gap



73 total employees have zero AI tools.


26 unresolved license rows blocking accurate counts.



Recommended actions



Provision Claude / ChatGPT licences for AI-active project teams this week.


Resolve outstanding unmatched handles via aliases.csv.


Establish a licence-request SLA (target: 48 hrs).





рџџҰSCALE


Move the L2 middle



Load AI Maturity Self-Assessment responses to size this cohort.



Recommended actions



Launch an L2в†’L3 upskilling cohort using internal AI methodology.


Focus on the largest BUs first вЂ” biggest leverage per session.


Pair each cohort member with a daily AI workflow exercise.





рџџұAMPLIFY


L3 / L4 AI champions



Load AI Maturity Self-Assessment responses to identify champions.



Recommended actions



Formalise an internal AI champions programme.


Pair champions with lagging BUs as embedded mentors.


Capture champion playbooks for reuse across the org.

title: Snapshot вЂ” 2026-05
text:
Strategic themes вЂ” next month

Three concrete cohorts to action next month, derived from the data above. Numbers in bold are pulled from this snapshot; framings (PRIORITY / SCALE / AMPLIFY) mirror the ExCo reportвЂ™s В§4.




рџ”өPRIORITY


Tool provisioning gap



2 respondents self-assessed L3/L4 with no tools provisioned.


49 total employees have zero AI tools.


34 unresolved license rows blocking accurate counts.



Recommended actions



Provision Claude / ChatGPT licences for AI-active project teams this week.


Resolve outstanding unmatched handles via aliases.csv.


Establish a licence-request SLA (target: 48 hrs).





рџџҰSCALE


Move the L2 middle



51 respondents at L2 with tools licensed.


They use AI reactively, not yet in their workflow.



Recommended actions



Launch an L2в†’L3 upskilling cohort using internal AI methodology.


Focus on the largest BUs first вЂ” biggest leverage per session.


Pair each cohort member with a daily AI workflow exercise.





рџџұAMPLIFY


L3 / L4 AI champions



24 respondents self-assessed L3/L4 вЂ” strategic AI practitioners.


Chase non-respondents to fill in coverage gaps.



Recommended actions



Formalise an internal AI champions programme.


Pair champions with lagging BUs as embedded mentors.


Capture champion playbooks for reuse across the org.
